summary: Payment flow update testing completed. Backend: 5/5 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All screens verified. Fixed 2 critical backend bugs blocking rating functionality. Complete Rapido-style payment flow (Book → Complete → OTP → Payment → Rating) working end-to-end for both cash and online payments.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend payment flow: All 8 endpoints tested and working correctly
POST /api/bookings: Correctly creates booking WITHOUT payment_method (payment happens after service)
PATCH /api/bookings/{id}/complete: Generates 4-digit OTP, sets status to awaiting_otp
PATCH /api/bookings/{id}/verify-otp: Rejects wrong OTP (400), accepts correct OTP, sets status to awaiting_payment
PATCH /api/bookings/{id}/pay-cash: Records cash payment with invoice_due_date (7 days), sets status to completed
POST /api/payments/create-order: Creates REAL Razorpay order (verified order_id format: order_*)
PATCH /api/bookings/{id}/pay-online-complete: Completes booking after Razorpay payment, sets payment_status to paid
POST /api/ratings: Correctly blocks rating if status != completed OR payment_status not in [paid, cash_received, completed]
Frontend booking screen: Shows 'Pay after service is done' info card, NO payment method selection (correct)
Frontend payment screen: Has UPI/GPay and Cash options with proper testIDs (pay-online-btn, pay-cash-btn)
Frontend cleaner active screen: Has Job Complete button, OTP input, Cash Received button with testIDs
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (Fixed MongoDB collection boolean check in rating endpoint line 847)
seed_data_creation: Test users and cleaners created during payment flow tests with TEST_PAY_ prefix for easy cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment flow update fully tested and working. Two critical bugs were found and fixed: (1) MongoDB collection boolean check error in rating endpoint causing 500 errors, (2) Missing payment_status in pay-online-complete endpoint causing rating to be blocked. Both cash and online payment flows tested end-to-end. Razorpay real order creation verified working.
rca_of_issue: Bug 1 - Rating API 500 Error: Root cause was MongoDB collection boolean check (line 847: 'if target_collection and target_id'). MongoDB Collection objects don't support boolean evaluation. Fix: Changed to 'if target_collection is not None and target_id'. Bug 2 - Rating Blocked After Online Payment: Root cause was missing payment_status field in pay-online-complete endpoint. Rating validation checks payment_status in [paid, cash_received, completed], but online payment only set status and payment_method, not payment_status. Fix: Added 'payment_status': 'paid' to the update operation.
